changes.motivation: The `.pre-commit-config.yaml` was previously gitignored because it was auto-generated by Nix at devshell entry. Moving to a static checked-in file eliminates the Nix generation step and makes the config visible in version control.
changes.summary: Removed `.pre-commit-config.yaml` from `.gitignore` and committed the static file to the repository.

changes.motivation: The auto-generated config contained `/nix/store/<hash>-<pkg>/bin/<cmd>` paths that are machine-specific and break when dependencies update. Bare command names rely on the devshell PATH instead.
changes.summary: Replaced all `/nix/store/...` absolute paths in `.pre-commit-config.yaml` with bare command names (e.g., `cspell`, `prettier`, `shellcheck`).

changes.motivation: Several pre-commit hooks previously used anonymous `writeShellScript` Nix derivations that had no corresponding standalone commands on PATH. These needed to become real scripts to work with the static config.
changes.summary: Created 6 new `ds-*` shell scripts in `packages/local/scripts/`: `ds-lint-website.sh`, `ds-typecheck-website.sh`, `ds-lint-cli.sh`, `ds-typecheck-cli.sh`, `ds-test-cli.sh`, and `ds-generate-tf-reference-hook.sh`.

changes.motivation: With a static config committed to the repo, the Nix-based generation machinery in the local devshell is no longer needed.
changes.summary: Deleted `packages/local/lint.nix` and removed its import and `prekConfig` install step from `packages/local/default.nix`.

changes.motivation: The framework devshell generator (`precommit.nix`) that allowed external Panfactum users to auto-generate hook configs is no longer needed now that the local devshell uses a static config.
changes.summary: Deleted `packages/devshell/precommit.nix`, removed the `precommit` parameter from `packages/devshell/default.nix`, and removed the pre-commit hooks section from `packages/devshell/scripts/enter-shell-local.sh`.

changes.motivation: The `pf precommit install` CLI command existed solely to merge a user-provided `.pre-commit-config.custom.yaml` with the auto-generated config. With a static config, this merge step is unnecessary.
changes.summary: Deleted `packages/cli/src/commands/precommit/install/command.ts` and removed its import/registration from `packages/cli/src/index.ts`. Removed `.pre-commit-config.yaml` from gitignore expectations in `packages/cli/src/util/devshell/constants.ts`.

changes.motivation: The `precommit` parameter in `flake.nix` was used to pass hook config to the `mkDevShell` function. With static config, this parameter is dead code.
changes.summary: Removed the `precommit` parameter from `panfactumPackages` and `mkDevShell` in `flake.nix`.

changes.motivation: The contributing docs described the old workflow of running `pf precommit install` and noted that `.pre-commit-config.yaml` would be auto-generated. These docs needed to reflect the new static approach.
changes.summary: Updated `packages/website/src/content/docs/{main,edge}/guides/contributing/pull-requests/index.mdx` to reflect the static pre-commit config workflow.

changes.motivation: The static `.pre-commit-config.yaml` had all hooks in a flat list with no explanation of grouping or priority. Adding comments and spacing makes the intent of each group clear.
changes.summary: Added section header comments and blank lines between hook groups in `.pre-commit-config.yaml` to explain priority grouping and purpose.

problems: Nix flakes only include git-tracked files (`src = ./.` captures only staged/committed files). The new `ds-*` scripts were untracked after creation, causing `direnv reload` to silently exclude them from the built derivation. This had to be discovered by trial and error. The `packages/local/scripts/default.nix` (or its parent README) should document that new scripts must be `git add`-ed before rebuilding.

Claude Code inherits `$PATH` at launch time and does not pick up devshell changes from a `direnv reload` mid-session. This caused the stop hook to fail after the devshell was rebuilt because the new `ds-*` scripts were still not found. This behaviour is not documented anywhere in the project; a note in the devshell setup docs or `CONTRIBUTING.md` would prevent confusion.

The initially committed `.pre-commit-config.yaml` contained machine-specific `/nix/store/<hash>/bin/<cmd>` absolute paths that would break on any other machine or after a dependency update. This critical issue was only discovered during PRD planning, not before the initial commit. The generation code in `lint.nix` should have had a comment warning that the generated output contains store paths unsuitable for static commitment.

The doc generation task agent (invoked for the docs update task) inadvertently modified unrelated `kube_namespace/reference.mdx` files, which had to be manually reverted with `git checkout`. The spec for the docs task did not clearly constrain the agent to only touch the pull-requests guide files, leading to unintended side effects.
